data.title: Sustainable Packaging Market Size to Surpass USD 476 Billion by 2032, Shows New Maximize Market Research Analysis
data.description: In Pune, India, on March 24, 2026, the Sustainable Packaging Market Global Outlook report from Maximize Market Research covers trends from 2025 to 2032. The report includes insights on emerging materials, regional adoption trends, and corporate strategies. Key information about the global sustainable packaging industry is outlined in the report, providing a comprehensive overview of the market landscape.

data.title: Genians Recognizes 2025 Partner of the Year Winners as Global Footprint Expands Across Key Markets
data.description: Located in San Jose, California, Genians, a leading network security company, has revealed the winners of its annual Partner of the Year awards. These prestigious awards were granted to partners who showcased excellence in various areas such as new client acquisition, market expansion, and proficiency in compliance-focused settings. The recipients for the year 2025, who are part of the 5,000+ organizations served by Genians worldwide, demonstrated exceptional performance by leveraging their regional knowledge and utilizing a reliable tech platform to secure victories consistently in their respective localities.

data.title: Survey: CMOs and CCOs Seeing Improved Budgets--and Tougher Workloads--in 2026
data.description: A recent study conducted by The Conference Board has revealed optimistic sentiments among top marketing and communications executives. The CMO+CCO Meter report for Q1 2026 shows that chief marketing officers (CMOs) and chief communications officers (CCOs) are expressing positivity regarding their budgets. This indicates a significant increase in confidence levels among these industry leaders. The report, which surveyed a notable number of executives in the field, highlights a strong outlook for marketing and communications expenditures in the current quarter.

data.title: Gcore Radar report reveals 150% surge in DDoS attacks year-on-year
data.description: A recent report by Gcore reveals a concerning trend in the threat landscape, showcasing increased automated attack capabilities, along with a rise in scale and frequency of attacks. This data, released on March 24, 2026, highlights the growing challenges faced by organizations in the realm of cybersecurity. Gcore, a prominent global provider of AI, cloud, network, and security solutions, emphasized the need for heightened vigilance in dealing with these threats. The report underscores the urgency for businesses to enhance their security measures in light of these evolving risks.

data.title: Global Video Streaming Market to Reach USD 885.95 Billion by 2036 as Asia-Pacific and North America Drive Digital Expansion; Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, Disney+ and YouTube Lead Platform Innovation
data.description: Rapidly increasing mobile usage in India and China, along with the dominance of premium content in the U.S., coupled with the emergence of AI-driven streaming platforms, are causing significant shifts in the worldwide entertainment industry. A recent study by Future Market Insights reveals that in 2026, the global video consumption patterns continue to evolve. With a population of over 1.3 billion, India stands out as a key market, witnessing a surge in mobile-first viewing habits. Similarly, China has embraced mobile technology, contributing to the changing entertainment landscape. Meanwhile, the U.S. remains a leader in providing top-notch content experiences, setting a precedent for the global market. The integration of artificial intelligence in streaming services is also reshaping how content is delivered and consumed. This transformation underscores the ongoing revolution in how entertainment is accessed and enjoyed worldwide, showcasing the dynamic nature of the industry.

data.title: Gresham Smith Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World's Most Innovative Companies for the Second Year in a Row
data.description: Nashville-based architecture firm Gresham Smith has achieved the impressive ranking of number 4 in the industry. The company recently secured a spot on Fast Company's esteemed list of the World's Most Innovative Companies for the latest year, further solidifying its reputation within the industry. This recognition highlights businesses that demonstrate forward-thinking and creativity.

data.title: E-Bike Market Worth USD 153.39 Billion by 2032, Exclusive Report by Maximize Market Research
data.description: In Pune, India, as of March 24, 2026, a report by Maximize Market Research predicts significant growth in the E-Bike Market. It is projected to increase from USD 68.10 billion in 2025 to USD 153.41 billion by 2032, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.3% over the forecast period. The comprehensive report offers detailed insights into this market trend.

data.title: Fosun Pharma Announces 2025 Annual Results
data.description: Fosun Pharma, a leading global pharmaceutical and healthcare company, credited its high-quality growth to innovation and globalization. The company, listed under the stock codes 600196.SH and 02196.HK, revealed its annual report for 2025 on March 24, 2026 in Shanghai.
